text: 🚨 SEV-1 Incident: Database connection pool exhausted in production
Investigating now. Seeing connection timeouts across all app servers.
Attaching the connection pool metrics dashboard screenshot
Root cause identified: a rogue query was holding 200 connections. Killed it.
Confirmed service is recovering. Marking incident as mitigated.
SEV-2 Incident: Payment processing latency spike detected
Alert: Payment API p99 latency exceeded 5s threshold
Here are the Grafana dashboards and API logs
Resolved. Third-party gateway had a regional degradation. Failover to secondary provider complete.
